Issues: The image is a highly stylized, minimalist silhouette. While this style has commercial appeal (especially for wallpapers or graphic design), it may lack the complexity or detailed artistic execution required to command high prices in fine art markets.
The composition is simple (subject + background). For maximum commercial appeal, adding unique color grading, intricate textures, or a more complex perspective could increase its uniqueness.
The technical skill and creativity scores are limited by the minimalist approach, which sacrifices complexity that often drives high sales for architectural subjects.
